data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the enforcement of cancellation tracking or penalties for late cancellations. The linked use case mentions the penalty but lacks concrete evidence of the system's ability to enforce this requirement. Therefore, the validation of the scenario behavior remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation tracking or penalty enforcement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
